← Ontology

🌱 Vegetation_Planting

Parent item
33314415-10e1-816d-83f1-e6eb4734ef50
long_description
Trees, shrubs, and groundcovers restore structure, microclimate, habitat, and hydrology when they are chosen and arranged with ecological purpose. This tag denotes planting as a deliberate act of rebuilding function and resilience—not cosmetic greening disconnected from what the land needs.
slug
Vegetation_Planting
Activities
33314415-10e1-813c-b738-c4869386f6bf, 33314415-10e1-8132-a2b4-c559b9cfeebc, 33314415-10e1-81b6-800f-f21497784a16, 33314415-10e1-81a2-9210-e794d43de95f, 33314415-10e1-81a4-a7b2-fc37f532171d, 33314415-10e1-814f-a6c8-cca8058b7b45, 33314415-10e1-813e-8c8b-d0a3943fccc7, 33314415-10e1-8118-8c66-f59f674e5ae7, 33314415-10e1-8141-aa81-ec0c9b8f54f7, 33314415-10e1-81ac-bbb8-c1aaca02e83c, 33314415-10e1-814d-a3d5-d72f435ad4ca, 33314415-10e1-8119-a59c-d743aa6dc336, 33314415-10e1-81d4-b410-ead38c1470fe, 33314415-10e1-81e9-8128-ea0ce6f4ef5b
Description
Establishing native trees, shrubs, and groundcovers in patterns that restore structure, function, and climate resilience in degraded landscapes.
parent_pattern_name
Ecosystem Regeneration
sort_order
7
